hooks.command: pnpm turbo typecheck && pnpm turbo lint && pnpm turbo test

bash -c 'BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current); if [[ "$BRANCH" == work/* ]]; then MSG="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_command"; if ! echo "$MSG" | grep -q "Agent:\|Requirement:"; then echo "WARN: Commit on work/ branch without Agent:/Requirement: trailers" >&2; fi; fi'
bash -c '[[ $(git branch --show-current) != "main" ]] || { echo "BLOCKED: Push to main — use work/<slug> branch" >&2; exit 2; }'
bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; LINES=$(wc -l < "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); [[ $LINES -le 300 ]] || echo "WARNING: $FILE has $LINES lines (>300 hard limit, MUST #4)" >&2'
bash -c 'echo "Session ending — verify: guard functions passed, changes committed, state tracker updated" >&2'
